summary: Stellar audience recording of a 1985 show highlighted by an unforgettable Shakedown Street and strong second‑set jams.
review: The tape captures one of the most celebrated versions of “Shakedown Street” ever, with a soaring second set that rolls into a superb Cryptical Envelopment and a blazing The Other One.  Listeners rave about the clear audience mix that preserves the band’s live energy, though a few note the recording is incomplete.  Overall it’s a must‑hear for fans of the band’s mid‑80s peak.

ai_rating.rationale: The overwhelming majority of reviews praise both the performance (especially Shakedown Street and the second set) and the audio quality, yielding a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Many reviewers call the tape "nice" and "solid sound", noting it captures the “Merriweather” vibe; some mention occasional drop‑outs or that the show is incomplete, but overall the audience mix is praised as one of the best.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opens with a monster Shakedown Street, flows into an extended jam that segues into Cryptical Envelopment and later fires up with The Other One; the energy stays high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his guitar tone and overall playing – several reviewers call it "Jerry at his finest" and note he nailed the Shakedown opening.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned hitting powerful chords that lit up the stage during the Shakedown intro, adding visual impact.
